unit: plan (multi-plan phase; entries below are PLANS)

completed_tasks.name: Ch.7 Simplification leaves (6) + State walkthrough -- oracle-converged 6/6 (R1 0 pass/6 revise, R2 6 pass)

08-ORACLE-MODEL.md: locked the 3 Kerievsky per-axis anchors + retargeted spirit/judgment + example/walkthrough clause + mechanics/composed-primitive split; agent-reviewed (2 reviewers: consistency + unbiased), fixes applied
pilot-hardened the retargeted spirit axis via an A/B/C gate (correct/partial/wrong in step); fixed the spirit<->applicability double-score (applicability barred from the over-application guard)
spirit-only re-gate of all 12 shipped Kerievsky leaves; Command was partial (behavior-preservation caveat, not an over-application counterweight) -> fixed blind -> 12/12 correct

remaining_tasks.name: Ch.8 Generalization leaves (7): Form Template Method, Extract Composite, Replace One/Many Distinctions with Composite, Replace Hard-Coded Notifications with Observer, Unify Interfaces with Adapter, Extract Adapter, Replace Implicit Language with Interpreter (Interpreter = overflow-walkthrough candidate)
Ch.9 Protection (3) + Ch.10 Accumulation (2) + Ch.11 Utilities (3) = 8 leaves; incl. the 3rd Away case Move Accumulation to Visitor; 3 Utilities may carry GoF 'n/a -- utility'
Ch.4 smell fold + dedup (source-tagged) + finalize kerievsky README index + reconcile check-kerievsky NAMES to authored slugs + FULL battery GREEN + claude plugin validate = phase gate

human_actions_pending.action: Re-confirm pacing for the remaining plans (current mode: one chapter per session, owner checks in after each)
human_actions_pending.context: owner has been pacing one chapter at a time through Phase 8

this session's rubric work is DRIVER-side (.planning/08-ORACLE-MODEL.md), NOT an edit to .claude/agents/oracle*.md; the reload rule only fires on agent-file edits. The oracle/oracle-reviewer agents are unchanged since a01f51b (already reloaded).

decisions.decision: Execution runs INLINE in the main context (D-08) -- NOT gsd-executor, NOT worktrees
decisions.rationale: the clean-room loop needs Agent (spawn oracle/oracle-reviewer) + AskUserQuestion (owner escalation); gsd-executor has neither. BLOCKING (Phase-7 failure mode).

decisions.decision: Retargeted spirit/judgment axis owns ONLY the over-application counterweight
decisions.rationale: generic spirit fired ~0 times (public wisdom, correct by default); bound to the Direction field's justification it becomes book-specific and gates the content Phase 9's de-patterning coach (CCH-02) consumes. Applicability is BARRED from scoring that guard (pilot exposed the double-score). Pilot-validated A/B/C = correct/partial/wrong; 12/12 re-gate of existing leaves.

decisions.decision: The 3 Kerievsky per-axis anchors are LOCKED driver-side in 08-ORACLE-MODEL.md; pass them every remaining chapter
decisions.rationale: stops the anchors depending on the driver's memory; not an agent-file edit so no reload gate.

decisions.decision: The composed-primitive-field <-> Mechanics deterministic check is DEFERRED to Phase 11
decisions.rationale: a presence/subset check would not catch the semantic co-drift the oracle composed-primitive axis already handles; low value, and 08-06's only authorized checker edit is the NAMES-array reconciliation.

decisions.decision: Do NOT reopen committed, converged leaves on a lone adversarial re-pass
decisions.rationale: oracle-reviewer oscillates on mechanics/composed-primitive (re-flagged converged leaves with directives contradicting their R2 pass); honor the round cap and converged verdict. Re-gate ONLY changed axes (as the spirit-only re-gate did).

decisions.decision: CLEAN-ROOM FIREWALL (DST-04): main context never reads .oracle/ prose (ls for names only); only oracle/oracle-reviewer read the book
decisions.rationale: copyrighted Kerievsky expression must not enter the world-readable repo.

next_action: Resume 08-04 (Ch.8 Generalization). FIRST read 08-04-PLAN.md AND 08-ORACLE-MODEL.md (the locked anchors). Author the 7 Ch.8 leaves BLIND via the D-08 inline clean-room loop in the LOCKED Fowler leaf format + the 3 Kerievsky fields; EVERY leaf must carry a pattern-specific over-application counterweight in its ## Watch for (the retargeted spirit obligation). Run the DETERMINISTIC layer FIRST (node extract-samples.mjs tsc + check-hygiene + field-presence rg + composed-link resolution), fix blind, THEN gate via oracle-reviewer (SOURCE=.oracle/refactoring-to-patterns/index.md + 'Ch.8 -- Generalization'; NO sizes -- the agent self-chunks to EOF; axes = refactoring-leaf defaults + direction + composed-primitive + target-pattern + the RETARGETED spirit). Revise blind to all-pass; cap ~3 rounds; escalate non-convergence / unresolvable GoF via AskUserQuestion. Interpreter (Replace Implicit Language with Interpreter) is the strongest overflow-walkthrough candidate -- apply D-06 YAGNI (walkthrough only if the compact example loses the lesson). Commit the chapter + 08-04-SUMMARY. Owner is pacing one chapter per session -- check in after 08-04.
context_notes: Phase 8 = Kerievsky analog of Phase 7's LOCKED clean-room model. 12/27 leaves done (Ch.6 + Ch.7), all 12 spirit-re-gated correct. This session ALSO locked + pilot-validated the rubric: 08-ORACLE-MODEL.md is now the authoritative driver-side anchor reference for Ch.8-11 (read it before each chapter). FIREWALL (blocking): main context NEVER reads .oracle/ (ls only). Per chapter: author blind -> deterministic-checks-FIRST -> oracle-reviewer gate (sub-batch the chapter's leaves in one call) -> revise blind -> converge (~3 round cap). Precedent: chapters converge in 2 rounds; R1 tends to flag composed-primitive aptness + folded mechanics sub-steps + (now) a missing over-application counterweight. check-kerievsky is RED-by-design until 08-06; extract-samples/check-crossrefs/check-smells stay GREEN. Wave-2 plans (08-04/05) do NOT touch README.md or any checker .mjs (08-06 owns those).
